widgets_values: asian, perfect symmetry, perfectly aligned face, flawless lighting, studio lighting, ideal exposure, balanced highlights, clean background, professional retouching, perfect skin texture, airbrushed look, cinematic look, polished beauty shot, editorial quality, glamour style, controlled shadows, controlled reflections, sharp precision focus, ultra-clean edges, perfect color balance, perfectly centered framing, textbook composition, photo-studio appearance, artificially smooth details, aesthetic perfection, commercial beauty standards, overly refined rendering, rings, bracelets

The Face Detailer is basically another refiner but it will only apply to the face.

<-- Steps can be 6-12

<-- CFG should remain 1.0

<-- LCM

<-- Karras, Exponential, or Beta

<-- Denoise depends on how far the face is from the camera. If it is close then you want to keep denoise low at 0.7-0.15. If the face is farther away and needs more detail added then a higher denoise of 0.2-0.35 may be needed. There is some trial and error to find the right setting but keeping it always at 0.15 can also be a good strategy if you don't want to mess with it.

ANavai Navai walking along Naples Pier during sunset. Long dark hair windswept. She wears a flowy white summer dress with thin straps. She looks into the distance, holding the dress lightly with one hand. Background: pastel sky, soft waves, distant boats. Mood: dreamy, romantic, cinematic.

groups.title: Face Detailer - Only use if faces are far away
